summary: REQ-1 appears implemented in About.tsx: a new subsection heading "Guru & Associates is into" and a responsive 3-card grid with the exact specified titles, using the same card styling/hover treatment as existing feature cards. Two additional non-requested files were modified (frontend-file-summaries.txt, project_state.json).

hallucinated_features.description: Modified frontend-file-summaries.txt with descriptions of changes across multiple sections (e.g., Services, Testimonials, Contact, Photos) that were not requested and go beyond an About-only static layout change.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest constraints specify this is a static content/layout change in the About section only; no request to update summary/metadata describing other sections.

hallucinated_features.description: Updated project_state.json to add/track new feature requests (AR-1, AR-2) and mark statuses.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest did not request project tracking/metadata updates; only specified implementing REQ-1 in About.tsx.
